nodes.docs: Create a Katman client link powered by ofetch.

nodes.text:
(alias) type InferClient<T> = T extends ProcedureDef<infer TType extends ProcedureType, infer TInput, infer TOutput, ErrorDef> ? TType extends "subscription" ? undefined extends TInput ? () => AsyncIterableIterator<TOutput> : (input: TInput) => AsyncIterableIterator<TOutput> : undefined extends TInput ? () => Promise<TOutput> : (input: TInput) => Promise<TOutput> : T extends Record<string, unknown> ? { [K in keyof T]: InferClient<T[K]>; } : never
import InferClient
